description_long: This modern house features a striking combination of black and white exterior walls, with clean geometric lines and a flat roof design. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a spacious yard with manicured lawns, several trees, and landscaped greenery. A prominent feature is the backyard swimming pool, accompanied by a patio area with outdoor furniture and umbrellas for relaxation. The house has large windows, some floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. There is a separate garage structure with a red-tiled roof and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The overall layout is open and luxurious, with multiple outdoor living spaces and a rooftop terrace.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with black and white walls, large windows, a backyard pool, landscaped yard, and a separate garage with a red-tiled roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black facade, large windows, green lawn, and the pool area with surrounding patio furniture.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and the white section of the house with rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage with a red-tiled roof, the pool, and the white and black sections of the house.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, driveway, garage, and the black facade with landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, paved steps, and a minimalistic overhang, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway.
